entry.title: HeyClaude Skill Submission Factory
entry.description: Create portable Agent Skills, generate platform adapters, validate package metadata, and prepare issue-first HeyClaude submissions.
entry.seoDescription: Reusable skill for creating Agent Skills, Cursor adapters, compatibility metadata, and issue-first HeyClaude registry submissions.
entry.author: JSONbored
entry.cardDescription: Build valid Agent Skills and submit them to HeyClaude through maintainer-reviewed GitHub issues.
entry.usageSnippet: Use this skill when creating a portable Agent Skill and submitting it to the HeyClaude skills registry.
entry.copySnippet:
# Trigger
"Create a portable Agent Skill and prepare a HeyClaude issue-first submission."

# Required output
1) Valid SKILL.md package
2) Platform compatibility table
3) Cursor adapter draft when applicable
4) HeyClaude submission issue fields
entry.body:
## Knowledge Freshness

This skill is pinned to Agent Skills and HeyClaude submission behavior verified on **2026-04-27**.

## Retrieval Sources

- https://heyclau.de/submit
- https://developers.openai.com/codex/skills
- https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/skills
- https://docs.windsurf.com/windsurf/cascade/skills
- https://docs.cursor.com/en/context
- https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli/blob/main/docs/cli/custom-commands.md

## Core Workflow

1. Define the skill user, trigger language, and out-of-scope behavior.
2. Create a single root folder with `SKILL.md`.
3. Keep `SKILL.md` concise, with required `name` and `description` frontmatter.
4. Add only necessary optional resources under `scripts/`, `references/`, `assets/`, or `agents/openai.yaml`.
5. Generate compatibility notes for native Agent Skills platforms and adapter-only platforms.
6. Prepare HeyClaude issue fields from the canonical submission form instead of auto-publishing.

## Capability Scope

- Agent Skill package authoring
- Compatibility metadata
- Cursor `.mdc` adapter drafting
- Package validation checklist
- HeyClaude issue-first submission preparation

## Compatibility

### Native Agent Skills

- Claude
- Codex/OpenAI
- Windsurf
- Gemini

### Adapter Targets

- Cursor via `.cursor/rules/<skill-name>.mdc`
- Generic AGENTS or tool-specific context files

## Production Rules

- Do not claim native support for a platform unless its current docs support `SKILL.md`-style skills.
- Do not include private repo names, secrets, credentials, or internal operating details in a public skill.
- Do not auto-publish registry content; prepare a maintainer-reviewed issue submission.
- Keep package resources minimal and directly referenced from `SKILL.md`.

## Troubleshooting

**Issue:** The skill is too broad to trigger reliably
**Fix:** Narrow the description to the exact workflow and add negative scope.

**Issue:** Cursor users ask how to install it
**Fix:** Generate a Cursor rule adapter and label it as an adapter, not a native skill.
